rationale: In the citing paper, Tirunillai and Tellis (2014) appears only in a grouped parenthetical list of marketing studies that used LDA-based topic modeling. The paper does not single it out for a specific conceptual claim, method component, measurement choice, or empirical benchmark. The core methodological development is positioned as extending Poisson factorization via Canny (2004) and Gopalan et al. (2014), not as building directly on Tirunillai and Tellis (2014).
